case_title: HAAS, HERBERT vs. TELFOR, MICHAEL et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT TELFOR, MICHAEL ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-23-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TELFOR, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 675 FELL #7 $1,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, STAYED UNTIL NOV-07-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS. PLTF WILL APPLY SECURITY DEPOSIT TO ATTY FEES & COSTS. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
